description.en: Get the traceback where the Python object obj was allocated. Return a Traceback instance, or None if the tracemalloc module is not tracing memory allocations or did not trace the allocation of the object. See also gc.get_referrers() and sys.getsizeof() functions.

excerpt.es: Get the traceback where the Python object obj was allocated. Return a Traceback instance, or None if the tracemalloc module is not tracing memory allocations or did not trace the allocation of the obj...
excerpt.en: Get the traceback where the Python object obj was allocated. Return a Traceback instance, or None if the tracemalloc module is not tracing memory allocations or did not trace the allocation of the obj...

description.en: Get the maximum number of frames stored in the traceback of a trace. The tracemalloc module must be tracing memory allocations to get the limit, otherwise an exception is raised. The limit is set by the start() function.

excerpt.es: Get the maximum number of frames stored in the traceback of a trace. The tracemalloc module must be tracing memory allocations to get the limit, otherwise an exception is raised. The limit is set by t...
excerpt.en: Get the maximum number of frames stored in the traceback of a trace. The tracemalloc module must be tracing memory allocations to get the limit, otherwise an exception is raised. The limit is set by t...

description.en: Get the current size and peak size of memory blocks traced by the tracemalloc module as a tuple: (current: int, peak: int).

excerpt.es: Get the current size and peak size of memory blocks traced by the tracemalloc module as a tuple: (current: int, peak: int).
excerpt.en: Get the current size and peak size of memory blocks traced by the tracemalloc module as a tuple: (current: int, peak: int).

description.en: Get the memory usage in bytes of the tracemalloc module used to store traces of memory blocks. Return an int.

excerpt.es: Get the memory usage in bytes of the tracemalloc module used to store traces of memory blocks. Return an int.
excerpt.en: Get the memory usage in bytes of the tracemalloc module used to store traces of memory blocks. Return an int.
